review: If I wanted to watch a movie about running I'd see Forrest Gump!

* People in the tribe are smarter than they look out to be. Emotional intelligence is shown even in earliest of civilizations

Enjoyed the movie except for the running and chasing scenes. But to be fair , I don’t like those types of scenes in any movie. Parts where they were running from the arrows and the human sacrifice when the bodies and heads were dropping down the stairs was nicely done. Who ever picked this movie must be handsome.
